CustomField.description: Check For Non-CGP&H Lottery Number - 1 (Not Edison MTA)
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000LLwRj", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Centerplace_at_Edison__c"), "Lottery number should be Centerplace_at_Edison__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000LLwRP", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Rivendell_Heights__c"), "Lottery number should be Rivendell_Heights__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000mohxj", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000LKqIJ", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Village_Court_Seniors__c"), "Lottery number should be Village_Court_Seniors__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J1N00001hysKY", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Fairway_28__c"), "Lottery number should be Fairway_28__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J1N00001a7UtA", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Woodmont_Station_at_Cranford__c"), "Lottery number should be Woodmont_Station_at_Cranford__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J1N00001f9qcj", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Valley_Bloom__c"), "Lottery number should be Valley_Bloom__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J1N00001fB67S", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Laurel_Green__c"), "Lottery number should be Laurel_Green__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0J3m00001ibfH2", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Village_of_Bridgewater__c"), "Lottery number should be Village_of_Bridgewater__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(
Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLwRj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLwRP", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000mohxj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LKqIJ", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001hysKY", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001a7UtA", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001f9qcj", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J1N00001fB67S", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0J3m00001ibfH2"
), "Good", "Good"
))))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For properties with non CGP&H lottery numbers, make sure to outreach as follows before moving to the next listing stage: 1. Non CGP&H Lottery Numbers 2. CGP&H Lottery Numbers 3. Interest Date
CustomField.label: Lottery Number Check 02
